name: West End Golf Club
about: West End Golf Club is a premier indoor golf simulator facility located in New Jersey. The venue is designed to create a safe, non-intimidating space to grow the local golf community. With state-of-the-art technology and stunning graphics, it offers a true-to-life golfing experience for all skill levels, from seasoned pros to beginners. The club provides flexible booking options, hourly rentals, and membership plans, making it accessible for casual visits or dedicated practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with advanced technology and stunning graphics
Non-intimidating environment welcoming to all skill levels
Flexible booking options with both hourly and membership plans
Availability for leagues, events, and corporate gatherings
